name: Homemade Galiano
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract or Vanilla Bean Extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and water in a pan and bring to a boil.
2. Boil for 1 minute, then reduce heat.
3. Simmer for 1 hour or until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. Pour the sugar-water syrup into a sterilized quart-size bottle.
6. Add anise extract, vanilla extract (or vanilla bean extract), and yellow food coloring. Stir gently.
7. Add vodka. Cover and let the mixture sit for 10 days to 2 weeks before serving.
Yield: 32 oz
Cost of Ingredients: $9.28
Comparable purchased product: Galiano, 25.4 oz - $17.18 (Savings: $12.36)
This liqueur is known by its bright yellow color, but it can also be made without adding the food coloring if you prefer.
